name: build-au-plugins
description: Codex workflows for AUv3, SwiftUI audio plugin, and real-time DSP development.

interface.shortDescription: Build and validate AUv3 audio plugins with SwiftUI and real-time DSP guidance.
interface.longDescription: Build AU Plugins provides focused Codex skills for Apple AUv3 plugin architecture, host validation, distribution, real-time DSP, filters, dynamics, and regression testing.
defaultPrompt: Debug AUv3 host discovery and auval failures.
